hypothesis: A 25-record ExECT S2 diagnostic cap on Qwen3.6:35b tests whether frozen v1.3 investigation and comorbidity label policy generalize without multi-family seizure drift seen on early GPT S2 passes.
metric_caveats: This diagnostic validation cap is a gating check for Qwen3.6:35b ExECT S2 replication; it is not a performance estimate.
These are partial ExECT S2 diagnostics (five families), not published ExECTv2 Table 1 reproduction.
Pooled micro F1 across five families is not comparable to frozen S1 three-family headlines.
Cap-25 ExECT runs are systematically optimistic vs full validation; treat as schema and drift signal only.
This config intentionally avoids ChainOfThought, BootstrapFewShot, and GEPA per docs/policies/qwen_dspy_latency_policy.md.
Do not compare this run to GPT cap-25 or full validation as the same experiment.
Record local Ollama GPU residency or RAM offload when inspecting artifacts.
